label: Gradient text
summary: Two-stop gradient display text in fire, ice, and toxic flavors.
era: The WordArt welcome banner and the logo-mill headline GIF, a gradient poured into very large letters.

classes.name: rs-gradient-text
classes.role: two-stop gradient text, display sizes only

a11y: Real text with a painted fill, keep it at display sizes, so both gradient stops clear large-text contrast against the theme background.
